Action Button Manager Currency Picker File Template Editor Repeater Table Plugin Template Editor Treeview Wizard Form

Color

Color Palette

All color tokens defined as CSS custom properties (--vds-*) on :root. Apply consistently across light and dark modes.

Semantic Colors

Use semantic tokens for interactive elements, alerts, and status indicators.

#f7921e
Primary Luminous Orange --vds-primary
#6a6a6a
Secondary Gray --vds-secondary
#077d55
Success Green --vds-success
#186ade
Info Blue --vds-info
#f5c518
Warning Yellow --vds-warning
#d91f11
Danger Red --vds-danger

Luminous Orange

Primary
100 #fcf3e8 --vds-luminous-orange-100
200 #fae1c5 --vds-luminous-orange-200
300 #fcca91 --vds-luminous-orange-300
400 #f9b361 --vds-luminous-orange-400
500 #f7921e --vds-luminous-orange-500
600 #a35f10 --vds-luminous-orange-600
700 #794509 --vds-luminous-orange-700
800 #5b3205 --vds-luminous-orange-800
900 #432403 --vds-luminous-orange-900
1000 #261201 --vds-luminous-orange-1000

Gray Scale

100 #f5f5f5 --vds-gray-100
200 #e5e5e5 --vds-gray-200
300 #d5d5d5 --vds-gray-300
400 #a4a4a4 --vds-gray-400
500 #888888 --vds-gray-500
600 #6a6a6a --vds-gray-600
700 #4e4e4e --vds-gray-700
800 #393939 --vds-gray-800
900 #272727 --vds-gray-900
1000 #161616 --vds-gray-1000

Extended Palette

Blue #186ade --vds-blue
Indigo #545fe8 --vds-indigo
Purple #8f49de --vds-purple
Pink #cc1d92 --vds-pink
Red #d91f11 --vds-red
Orange #e86427 --vds-orange
Yellow #f5c518 --vds-yellow
Green #077d55 --vds-green
Teal #167b7d --vds-teal
Cyan #067a91 --vds-cyan

Dark Mode

Apply data-bs-theme="dark" to any element to enable dark theme tokens.

data-bs-theme="dark"
Primary
Success
Info
Danger
Body text
Background
On this page
